```text
     9→import { Hero } from './components/Hero'
    10→import { HomePageTimeLine } from './components/HomePageTimeLine'
    11→import { SecondScreen } from './components/SecondScreen'
    12→import { Windsock } from './components/Windsock'
    13→import { getQueryKey } from './query'
    14→
    15→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    16→
    17→export default definePrerenderPage<{ locale: string }>()({
    18→  async fetcher({ locale }) {
    19→    const queryClient = getQueryClient()
    20→    const queryKey = getQueryKey(locale)
    21→
    22→    try {
    23→      return await queryClient.fetchQuery({
    24→        queryKey,
    25→        queryFn: async () => (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized,
    26→      })
    27→    } catch (error) {
    28→      return requestErrorHandler(error)
    29→    }
    30→  },
    31→  async Component(props) {
    32→    const queryClient = getQueryClient()
    33→    const queryKey = getQueryKey(props.params.locale)
    34→
    35→    const dehydrateState = dehydrate(queryClient, {
    36→      shouldDehydrateQuery(query) {
    37→        return isShallowEqualArray(query.queryKey as any, queryKey)
    38→      },
    39→    })
    40→
    41→    return (

    46→        <Windsock />
    47→        {props.children}
```

```text
   207→
   208→// --- Sub-components ---
   209→
   210→const HeroWritingStats = ({
   211→  layout,
   212→  shouldAnimate,
   213→}: {
   214→  layout: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
   215→  shouldAnimate: boolean
   216→}) => {
   217→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   218→  const locale = useLocale()
   219→  const { data } = useQuery({
   220→    queryKey: ['site-info', locale],
   221→    queryFn: () =>
   222→      apiClient.aggregate.proxy.site_info.get<{
   223→        postCount: number
   224→        noteCount: number
   225→        totalWordCount: number
   226→        firstPublishDate: string | null
   227→      }>(),
   228→    staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,
   229→  })
   230→
   231→  const articleCount = (data?.postCount ?? 0) + (data?.noteCount ?? 0)
   232→  const wordCountWan = data?.totalWordCount
   233→    ? Math.round(data.totalWordCount / 10000)
   234→    : 0
   235→  const days = data?.firstPublishDate
   236→    ? Math.floor(
   237→        (Date.now() - new Date(data.firstPublishDate).getTime()) / 86400000,
   238→      )
   239→    : 0
   240→
   241→  const items = [
   242→    { value: articleCount, label: t('hero_stat_posts') },
   243→    { value: wordCountWan, label: t('hero_stat_words_unit') },
   244→    { value: days, label: t('hero_stat_days') },
   245→  ]
   246→
   247→  return (
   248→    <div
   249→      className={clsx(
   250→        layout === 'vertical'
   251→          ? 'flex flex-col gap-1 text-right font-serif italic'
   252→          : 'flex gap-5 font-serif italic',
   253→        'text-xs text-neutral-6',
   254→        cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-stats'),
   255→      )}
   256→    >
   257→      {items.map((item, index) => (
   258→        <Fragment key={item.label}>
   259→          {layout === 'horizontal' && index > 0 && (
   260→            <span className="text-neutral-6">·</span>
   261→          )}
   262→          <div>
   263→            <span className="not-italic text-2xl font-medium text-neutral-7">
   264→              <NumberSmoothTransition>{item.value}</NumberSmoothTransition>
   265→            </span>{' '}
   266→            {item.label}
   267→          </div>
   268→        </Fragment>
   269→      ))}
   270→    </div>
   271→  )
   272→}
   273→
   274→const HeroRecentWriting = ({ shouldAnimate }: { shouldAnimate: boolean }) => {
   275→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   276→  const homeData = useHomeQueryData()
   277→  const { posts = [], notes = [] } = homeData || {}
   278→
   279→  const recentItems = useMemo(() => {
   280→    const all = [
   281→      ...posts.map((p: any) => ({
   282→        title: p.title,
   283→        href: routeBuilder(Routes.Post, {
   284→          category: p.category.slug,
   285→          slug: p.slug,
   286→        }),
   287→        created: p.created,
   288→      })),
   289→      ...notes.map((n: any) => ({
   290→        title: n.title,
   291→        href: buildNotePath(n),
   292→        created: n.created,
   293→      })),
   294→    ]
   295→    return all
   296→      .sort(
   297→        (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   298→      )
   299→      .slice(0, 3)
   300→  }, [posts, notes])
   301→
   302→  if (!homeData) {
   303→    return (
   304→      <div className={cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-writing')}>
   305→        <div className="mb-3 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-6">
   306→          {t('hero_recently_writing')}
   307→        </div>
   308→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
   309→          {[65, 80, 55].map((w) => (
   310→            <div
   311→              className="h-4 animate-pulse rounded bg-neutral-3/50"
   312→              key={w}
   313→              style={{ width: `${w}%` }}
   314→            />
   315→          ))}
   316→        </div>
   317→      </div>
   318→    )
   319→  }
   320→
   321→  if (recentItems.length === 0) return null
   322→
   323→  return (
   324→    <div className={cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-writing')}>
   325→      <div className="mb-3 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-6">
   326→        {t('hero_recently_writing')}
   327→      </div>
   328→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
   329→        {recentItems.map((item) => (
   330→          <Link
   331→            className="block border-b border-neutral-4/40 pb-1.5 text-base text-neutral-7 transition-colors duration-300 hover:text-accent"
   332→            href={item.href}
   333→            key={item.href}
   334→          >
   335→            {item.title}
   336→          </Link>
   337→        ))}
   338→      </div>
   339→    </div>
   340→  )
   341→}
   342→
   343→const HeroSocialIcons = ({
   344→  socialIds,
   345→  shouldAnimate,
   346→}: {
   347→  socialIds: Record<string, string> | undefined
   348→  shouldAnimate: boolean
   349→}) => (
   350→  <div className={clsxm('flex gap-4', cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-social'))}>
   351→    {Object.entries(socialIds || noopObj).map(([type, id]: any) => {
   352→      if (!isSupportIcon(type)) return null
   353→      return <SocialIcon id={id} key={type} type={type} variant="mono" />
   354→    })}
   355→  </div>
   356→)
   357→
   358→const HeroHitokoto = ({ shouldAnimate }: { shouldAnimate: boolean }) => {
   359→  const t = useTranslations('home')
   360→  const { custom, random } = useAppConfigSelector(
   361→    (config) => config.hero.hitokoto || {},
   362→  )!
   363→
   364→  return (
   365→    <div
   366→      className={clsxm(
   367→        'max-w-[45ch] font-serif text-sm italic text-neutral-6 lg:text-right',
   368→        cn(shouldAnimate, 'hero-enter-hitokoto'),
   369→      )}
   370→    >
   371→      {random ? (
   372→        <RemoteHitokotoQuote />
   373→      ) : (
   374→        <>「{custom ?? t('hero_default_hitokoto')}」</>
   375→      )}
   376→    </div>
   377→  )
   378→}
   379→
   380→const RemoteHitokotoQuote = () => {
   381→  const locale = useLocale()
   382→  const {
   383→    data: hitokoto,
   384→    isLoading,
   385→    refetch,
   386→    isRefetching,
   387→  } = useQuery({
   388→    queryKey: ['hitokoto', locale],
   389→    queryFn: () => fetchQuoteByLocale(locale),
   390→    refetchInterval: 300000,
   391→    staleTime: Infinity,
   392→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
   393→    meta: { persist: true },
   394→  })
   395→
   396→  if (isLoading || !hitokoto) return null
   397→
   398→  return (
   399→    <span className="group inline-flex items-center gap-1.5">
   400→      「{hitokoto}」
   401→      <MotionButtonBase
   402→        disabled={isRefetching}
   403→        className={clsxm(
   404→          'opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100',
   405→          isRefetching && 'animate-spin opacity-100',
   406→        )}
   407→        onClick={() => refetch()}
   408→      >
   409→        <i className="i-mingcute-refresh-2-line text-[10px]" />
   410→      </MotionButtonBase>
   411→    </span>
   412→  )
   413→}
   414→
```

```text
    48→
    49→export default async function LocaleLayout({ children, params }: Props) {

    54→  }

    70→          <SayHi />

    83→        </body>
    84→      </html>
    85→    )

    94→  headers.append(

    97→      .getAll()

   100→  )
   101→
   102→  headers.append('user-agent', 'Shiro')

   104→  const userAuth = await fetch(

   106→    { headers },
   107→  )
   108→    .then((res) => res.json())
   109→    .then((res) => !!res.ok)
   110→    .catch(() => false)
   111→
   112→  return (

   115→        <HydrateuserAuthProvider isLogged={userAuth} />

   119→            <Global />
   120→            <SayHi />

   127→              media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)"
   128→              rel="shortcut icon"
   129→              type="image/x-icon"
   130→            />
   131→            <link
   132→              href={favicon}
   133→              media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)"
   134→              rel="shortcut icon"
   135→              type="image/x-icon"
   136→            />
   137→            <ScriptInjectProvider />
   138→          </head>
   139→          <body
   140→            suppressHydrationWarning
   141→            className={`${sansFont.variable} ${serifFont.variable} m-0 h-full p-0 font-sans`}
   142→          >
   143→            <NextIntlClientProvider messages={messages}>
   144→              <SafariDetector />
   145→              <ErrorBoundary>
   146→                <WebAppProviders>
   147→                  {openpanel?.enable && (
   148→                    <OpenPanelInit
   149→                      apiUrl={openpanel.url}
   150→                      clientId={openpanel.id}
   151→                      trackOutgoingLinks={true}
   152→                      trackScreenViews={true}
   153→                    />
   154→                  )}
   155→                  <AggregationProvider
   156→                    aggregationData={data}
   157→                    appConfig={themeConfig.config}
   158→                  />
   159→                  <div data-theme id="root">
   160→                    <Root>{children}</Root>
   161→                  </div>
   162→                  <TocAutoScroll />
   163→                  <SearchPanelWithHotKey />
   164→                  <Analyze />
   165→                  <SyncServerTime />
   166→                  <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[var(--removed-body-scroll-bar-size)]" />
   167→                  <RootPortal>
   168→                    <BackgroundTexture />
   169→                  </RootPortal>
   170→                </WebAppProviders>
   171→              </ErrorBoundary>
   172→            </NextIntlClientProvider>
   173→          </body>
   174→        </html>
   175→      </AppFeatureProvider>
   176→    </>
   177→  )
   178→}
   179→
   180→const SayHi = () => (
   181→  <script
   182→    dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
   183→      __html: `var version = "${version}";
   184→    (${function () {
   185→      console.info(
   186→        `%c Mix Space %c https://github.com/mx-space`,
   187→        'color: #fff; margin: 1em 0; padding: 5px 0; background: #2980b9;',
   188→        'margin: 1em 0; padding: 5px 0; background: #efefef;',
   189→      )
   190→      console.info(
   191→        `%c 白い ${window.version} %c https://innei.in`,
   192→        'color: #fff; margin: 1em 0; padding: 5px 0; background: #39C5BB;',
   193→        'margin: 1em 0; padding: 5px 0; background: #efefef;',
   194→      )
   195→
   196→      const motto = `
   197→This Personal Space Powered By Mix Space.
   198→Written by TypeScript, Coding with Love.
   199→--------
   200→Stay hungry. Stay foolish. --Steve Jobs
   201→`
   202→
   203→      if (document.firstChild?.nodeType !== Node.COMMENT_NODE) {
   204→        document.prepend(document.createComment(motto))
   205→      }
   206→    }.toString()})();`,
   207→    }}
   208→  />
```

```text
import type { AggregateTop } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { useLocale } from 'next-intl'

export const getQueryKey = (locale: string) => ['home', locale]

export const useHomeQueryData = () => {
  const locale = useLocale()
  return useQuery({
    queryKey: getQueryKey(locale),
    queryFn: async () => null! as AggregateTop,
    enabled: false,
  }).data!
}
```

```text
# Locale "zh" Instances in HTML Source

Based on the provided webpage content, I found **no explicit instances** of the locale "zh" appearing in the HTML source, script tags, JSON data, or query keys that were successfully loaded.

## Key Observations:

1. **Language Meta**: The document appears to be a Chinese-language personal blog/portfolio site (title: "静かな森" with Japanese text), but the HTML lang attribute and locale settings are not visible in the provided excerpt.

2. **API Configuration**: The environment variables show API endpoints but don't specify locale parameters in the visible content.

4. **Locale Switcher Component**: There is a reference to a `LocaleSwitcher` component in the JavaScript bundle declarations, suggesting locale functionality exists, but the actual implementation and locale strings are not accessible in the truncated source.

**Conclusion**: The restrictive crawler policy prevented comprehensive analysis of locale-specific data structures in this response.
```

```text
     1→import 'server-only'

     3→import { RequestError } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { notFound } from 'next/navigation'
     5→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { createElement } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { BizErrorPage } from '~/components/common/BizErrorPage'
     9→import { NormalContainer } from '~/components/layout/container/Normal'
    10→import { API_URL } from '~/constants/env'
    11→
    12→import { attachServerFetch } from './attach-fetch'
    13→import { getErrorMessageFromRequestError } from './request.shared'
    14→
    15→export const requestErrorHandler = (error: unknown) => {
    16→  if (
    17→    error instanceof RequestError &&
    18→    (error.status === 404 || error.raw?.response?.status === 404)
    19→  ) {
    20→    return notFound()
    21→  }
    22→  throw error
    23→}
    24→
    25→const defaultErrorRenderer = (error: any) =>
    26→  createElement(
    27→    NormalContainer,
    28→    null,
    29→    createElement(
    30→      'p',
    31→      {
    32→        className: 'text-center',
    33→      },
    34→      error.message?.replace(API_URL, '<API_URL>'),
    35→    ),
    36→  )
    37→
    38→type AsyncComponent<P> = (props: P) => ReactNode | Promise<ReactNode>
    39→
    40→export const definePrerenderPage =
    41→  <Params extends {}>() =>
    42→  <T = {}>(options: {
    43→    fetcher: (params: Params) => Promise<T>
    44→    errorRenderer?: (error: any, params: Params) => ReactNode | void
    45→    requestErrorRenderer?: (
    46→      error: RequestError,
    47→      parsed: {
    48→        status: number
    49→        bizMessage: string
    50→      },
    51→      params: Params,
    52→    ) => ReactNode | void
    53→    Component: AsyncComponent<
    54→      NextPageExtractedParams<Params> & {
    55→        data: T
    56→        fetchedAt: string
    57→        searchParams: any
    58→      }
    59→    >
    60→
    61→    handleNotFound?: boolean
    62→  }) => {
    63→    const {
    64→      errorRenderer = defaultErrorRenderer,
    65→      fetcher,
    66→      Component,
    67→      handleNotFound = true,
    68→    } = options
    69→    return async (props: any) => {
    70→      const { params: params_, searchParams: searchParams_ } =
    71→        props as NextPageParams<Params, any>
    72→      const params = await params_
    73→      const searchParams = await searchParams_
    74→
    75→      try {
    76→        await attachServerFetch()
    77→        const data = await fetcher({
    78→          ...params,
    79→          ...searchParams,
    80→        })
    81→
    82→        return createElement(
    83→          Component as any,
    84→          {
    85→            data,
    86→            fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    87→            ...props,
    88→            params: {
    89→              ...params,
    90→              ...searchParams,
    91→            },
    92→          },
    93→          props.children,
    94→        )
    95→      } catch (error: any) {
    96→        // 如果在内部已经处理了 NEXT_NOT_FOUND，就不再处理
    97→        // @see next/packages/next/src/client/components/http-access-fallback/http-access-fallback.ts
    98→        if (error?.message === 'NEXT_HTTP_ERROR_FALLBACK;404') {
    99→          throw error
   100→        }
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 17:49:40Z)**_

吾查 HTML 源码，确认找到问题所在。

RSC payload 中有两棵树：

1. **not-found fallback 树**（`$4`）：`<html lang="zh">` + `NextIntlClientProvider locale="zh"` — 硬编码了 `zh`
2. **实际页面树**（`$8`）：`<html lang="ja">` + `locale:"ja"` + `queryKey:["home","ja"]` — 正确

故访问 `/ja` 时，not-found 回退路径中 locale 仍为 `zh`，此乃 `[locale]/layout.tsx` 之 not-found 分支未正确传递 locale 所致。

查当前 `[locale]/layout.tsx` 中 not-found 渲染部分：

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 17:50:22Z)**_

查完 HTML 源码后，发现问题所在：

**RSC payload 中 not-found 回退树仍有 `lang="zh"` 与 `locale:"zh"`。** 但实际页面树已正确使用 `lang="ja"` 与 `locale:"ja"`，hydrated query key 亦为 `["home","ja"]`。

关键发现：`NextIntlClientProvider` 在 not-found 回退中传了 `locale:"zh"`，此乃根布局之 not-found boundary，非 `[locale]/layout.tsx` 之 error 分支（该分支已正确传 `locale={locale}`）。

实际影响：
- 主页面渲染：locale 正确为 `ja`，hydration key `["home","ja"]` 匹配，**不应崩溃**
- Not-found 回退：`zh` 硬编码，仅 404 时触发

君所报之 `useHomeQueryData()` undefined 错误，若仍在当前部署版本中复现，可能是 client-side 从 `/`（默认 `zh`）导航至 `/ja` 时，cache 中仅有 `["home","zh"]` 而无 `["home","ja"]`，`enabled: false` 导致不会重新请求。

若需修此问题，可于 `useHomeQueryData` 中加 `placeholderData` 或令 `enabled` 在无 cache 时为 `true`。需要修么？
